description: Authored hard cases the current system is NOT expected to handle correctly, plus guard cases that must keep passing. This file is a standing red-team surface: when a failing case starts passing, it is promoted to the scenario suite and replaced here with something harder. Failures in this file are published, not fixed-then-hidden.

cases.text: ⚠️ Warning: the ETH airdrop links going around are SCAMS. The only real verified claim page is eth-claim-official.xyz — connect your wallet there before the window closes.
cases.rationale: Adversary wraps a drainer lure in protective language. Protective-context suppression should not grant immunity when the same post contains a connect-wallet ask; the conflict should route to review.
cases.known_blind_spot: Protective-context patterns currently suppress the public label without checking whether the speaker adds their own ask.

cases.text: Not sure if this is legit but this trading bot literally doubled my USDT in a week 😅 DM me for the link, still can't believe it works. DYOR!
cases.rationale: Testimonial-with-doubt is a documented scam format: the doubt markers are camouflage. Should route to review on doubling claim + DM funnel.
cases.known_blind_spot: Doubt markers reduce risk scoring in exactly the way adversaries want.

cases.text: Huge thanks to @cryptorecover_pro for getting back my stolen 0.4 BTC after I paid the small processing fee 🙏 DM them if you lost funds, they are the only legit recovery team!
cases.rationale: Advance-fee recovery scam advertised as a grateful testimonial — the standard format for re-victimization. The fee mention plus DM funnel should reach review.
cases.known_blind_spot: Testimonial voice ('thanks to...') is not covered by promoter-ask patterns.

cases.text: G4N4NCIAS GARANTIZADAS 💸 duplica tu USDT hoy mismo. Envía 50 USDT y recibe 100 de vuelta. Escríbeme al DM, cupos limitados.
cases.rationale: Spanish send-to-receive with leetspeak obfuscation of the guarantee keyword. Canonicalization plus Spanish rules should hold the label.
cases.known_blind_spot: Leetspeak canonicalization coverage for non-English keywords is untested beyond this case.

cases.text: Trading with my mentor honestly changed my life ❤️ financial freedom is real if you're willing to learn. My DMs are open if you want to know how I started.
cases.rationale: Pig-butchering recruitment surface: no explicit return claim, no link, just a DM funnel and a lifestyle promise. The highest-loss typology in IC3 data enters exactly like this.
cases.known_blind_spot: Without an explicit claim or ask, lexical systems have nothing to hold onto. Documented in the threat landscape as the core single-post limitation.

cases.text: Everything you need is in the screenshot 👇 send exactly what it shows and you'll get double back within the hour. Don't sleep on this one.
cases.rationale: The operative scam content lives in an image the text pipeline cannot see; the doubling promise in text should still carry it to review.
cases.known_blind_spot: OCR evidence extraction is simulated only; image-borne asks are invisible.

cases.text: I work at a top-5 exchange (obviously can't say which) and I can get a few people into vetted presales early. Small facilitation fee, serious inquiries only.
cases.rationale: Unverifiable insider authority plus an advance fee. No brand name is dropped, so authority-misuse patterns keyed to named brands may not fire.
cases.known_blind_spot: Authority detection is keyed to named entities; anonymous authority claims slip through.

cases.text: Avoid fake airdrops out there!! Only use the official verified faucet link in my bio to claim your free 2 ETH safely ✅
cases.rationale: Anti-scam framing used to market the poster's own free-claim funnel. 'Free 2 ETH' plus a claim link should force review despite the protective opener.
cases.known_blind_spot: Same suppression gap as unsolved-001, in bait rather than warning form.

cases.text: I think I just got scammed by one of those doubling sites... sent 0.2 BTC and got nothing back. I feel so stupid. What do I even do now?
cases.rationale: Victim help-seeking must never be labeled. This is a guard case: if it ever fails, the release gate failure is correct and the change that broke it must not ship.

cases.text: Week 3 update: staking dashboard showing +11% again 📈 compounding is unreal. Not financial advice but happy to share the platform if anyone's curious.
cases.rationale: Serialized fake-platform promotion: each post individually mild, pattern lethal. Single-post review routing on repeated yield claims plus offer-to-share is the best available proxy until account-history enrichment exists.
cases.known_blind_spot: No cross-post memory in the current pipeline; the campaign graph only clusters infrastructure, not serialized behavior by one account.
